name: pm
description: Shared product brain for small teams — research, strategy, grooming, and delivery in one place inside the repo

interface.shortDescription: Shared product brain for small teams.
interface.longDescription: PM keeps market research, strategy, competitor context, groomed work, and delivery state in one place inside the repo. Context compounds over time — every session builds on prior research, decisions, and evidence.
defaultPrompt: Research our market and key competitors.
Turn this feature idea into sprint-ready issues.

marketplace.description: Shared product brain for small teams — research, strategy, grooming, and delivery in one place inside the repo. Context compounds over time.
